subscriber_handover.Handover mode: assign to a specific user: Handover mode: assign to a specific user or auto-pick the least-loaded online active user.
subscriber_handover.Hands over a subscriber conversation to: Hands over a subscriber conversation to a human user (specific or auto least-loaded online active assignee).
subscriber_handover.Required when mode is set to \"specific\: Required when mode is set to "specific".

subscriber_update_labels.Assigns and/or removes labels from the c: Assigns and/or removes labels from the current subscriber in a single operation.
subscriber_update_labels.Label IDs to assign to the current subsc: Label IDs to assign to the current subscriber.
subscriber_update_labels.Label IDs to remove from the current sub: Label IDs to remove from the current subscriber.
